profile.innate_zh: 手脚麻利、记忆力好（记得常客）、热心肠
profile.learned_zh: 二十年食堂工作练出的大锅菜技术和对学生口味的了解
profile.learned_en: 20 years of big-pot cooking and knowing students' tastes
profile.goal_zh: 让食堂好评率保持年级第一
profile.goal_en: Keep canteen top-rated year after year
profile.contradiction_zh: 想做更好吃的菜 vs 预算有限
profile.contradiction_en: Wants tastier dishes vs. budget is tight
profile.surface_zh: 热情大嗓门、爱和学生聊天
profile.deep_en: Treats students like her own kids
profile.fear_en: A student getting sick from the food
profile.desire_zh: 每个来吃饭的人都吃得开心
profile.rhythm_zh: 早上最忙，下午备菜，晚上收尾
profile.rhythm_en: Busiest AM, prep PM, close at night
profile.spaces_zh: 第一食堂后厨、食堂前台、菜市场
profile.short_goal_zh: 今天的红烧肉要做出小时候的味道
profile.short_goal_en: Make today's red-braised pork taste like childhood
profile.constraint_zh: 食材成本在上涨；人手不够
profile.bias_zh: 倾向认为学生就应该多吃饭少减肥
profile.bias_en: Thinks students should eat more, diet less
profile.narrative_en: Look how thin you are - eat more
